description.value: You've grown an armored copi exoskeleton—far sturdier than most copaxi exoskeletons—to protect the rest of your body from harm. Your exoskeleton grants a +3 item bonus to AC, has a Dex cap of +1, a check penalty of –2, and a Strength threshold of +3, and has the comfort and exposed traits. You're trained in your exoskeleton. You can wear a @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.equipment.Item.Flight Suit], but you can't wear other armor. You can't install armor upgrades or etch armor runes onto your exoskeleton.
